claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.
sub_questions: Did an assault on reporter Savanah Hernandez occur at an anti-ICE protest, and are there videos of the incident?
Is the alleged perpetrator identified as Paige Ostroushko?
Was Paige Ostroushko arrested in connection with this incident? If so, when and by which jurisdiction?
Were charges filed (or stated as pending) against Paige Ostroushko? What are the official records?
What exactly did @savsays claim (date/time, wording), and what primary sources does she cite?
Are there corroborating reports from police, court records, or independent news outlets?
